corpus.title: Bill Gates the Victim: Claims Epstein Used His Personal Infidelities as Blackmail
corpus.signal_text:
Bill Gates the Victim: Claims Epstein Used His Personal Infidelities as Blackmail

Billionaire Microsoft co-founder Bill Gates claimed Wednesday disgraced sex offender Jeffrey Epstein attempted to use information about his personal life — including his multiple marriage infidelities — to blackmail him, copies of his first closed-door testimony to the House Oversight Committee detail. The post Bill Gates the Victim: Claims Epstein Used His Personal Infidelities as Blackmail appeared first on Breitbart.

corpus.title: Bill Gates diz que Jeffrey Epstein usou seus casos extraconjugais contra ele
corpus.signal_text:
Bill Gates diz que Jeffrey Epstein usou seus casos extraconjugais contra ele

Bill Gates, cofundador da Microsoft e filantropo bilionário, disse a um comitê do Congresso nesta quarta-feira (10) que o criminoso sexual Jeffrey Epstein explorou informações sobre seus casos extraconjugais para pressioná-lo "a retomar contato com ele" depois que Gates havia começado a cortar seus laços. Leia mais (06/10/2026 - 16h39)

corpus.title: Bill Gates berichtet von Erpressung durch Epstein
corpus.signal_text:
Bill Gates berichtet von Erpressung durch Epstein

Vor dem US-Kongress hat Microsoft-Mitgründer Gates angegeben, der Sexualstraftäter Epstein habe ihn wegen seiner Affären erpresst. Kriminelles Verhalten habe er aber sonst nie beobachtet. Der Kontakt sei ein Fehler gewesen.

corpus.title: Bill Gates faces questioning in US Congress over Epstein ties
corpus.signal_text:
Bill Gates faces questioning in US Congress over Epstein ties

Microsoft co-founder Bill Gates was set to face questioning Wednesday from U.S. lawmakers over his relationship with late sex offender Jeffrey Epstein, whose network of wealthy and powerful associates has fueled years of scrutiny and conspiracy theories.

corpus.title: Bill Gates: Epstein hat mich mit Affären erpresst
corpus.signal_text:
Bill Gates: Epstein hat mich mit Affären erpresst

Wie tief steckt Bill Gates im Missbrauchsskandal um Jeffrey Epstein? Der US-Milliardär gibt an, Epstein habe ihn erpresst. Von dem vielfachen Missbrauch will er nichts geahnt haben.
